rationale: Lens-item verification all passed: (1) skill rewrites are CORRECT — ms-spec-grill domain/ADR roots now point at the real flat .mindspec/{domains,adr} (both exist; ADR scan picks next-free 0039); ms-panel-run/tally co-located <spec-dir>/reviews/ EXACTLY matches the binary gate (panelGateRoots→panel.Scan globs <spec-dir>/reviews/*/panel.json on flat trees); instruct templates resolve. AC17 audit grep is EMPTY. (2) Fixture migrations are real, not papered: bootstrap manifest creates born-flat .mindspec/{domains,specs}; sandbox_test pins it; scenarios migrated to .mindspec/specs so no mixed-layout→idle. The lone remaining docs/specs is an intentional canonical-worktree tier-2 test. (3) doctor canonicalDomains/checkOrphanedBeads use tier-aware workspace.SpecsDir/DomainsDir; new TestCanonicalDomains_FlatTree proves flat resolution. (4) BOTH claimed failures verified pre-existing+layout-independent: instruct=ambient-bd leak (renders implement-mode); harness phase-detection=main-protected RenderIdleIfProtected idle short-circuit (literal 'main is protected' guidance). Neither is a 106 regression. BUT I found one MISSED flat-blind enumerator: DomainsNeedingPopulate still hardcodes .mindspec/docs/domains, so `mindspec ownership populate` silently no-ops on flat/born-flat trees — same bug the bead fixed elsewhere; violates Req3 'EVERY consumer'. One-line fix needed.
concrete_changes_required: internal/ownership/populate.go:71 — DomainsNeedingPopulate hardcodes `dir := filepath.Join(root, ".mindspec", "docs", "domains")`, which does NOT exist on a flat (or born-flat greenfield) tree, so os.ReadDir returns IsNotExist and the function returns nil → `mindspec ownership populate` (no-arg) enumerates ZERO domains and prints 'All domain OWNERSHIP.yaml manifests are populated (or no domains exist)' even when flat .mindspec/domains/ has missing/empty manifests. Make it tier-aware exactly like the bead's canonicalDomains fix: `dir := workspace.DomainsDir(root)`. Add a flat-fixture regression test (AC5/Req3) asserting it enumerates unpopulated domains under .mindspec/domains/. Also update the stale comment at populate.go:62 (still says .mindspec/docs/domains/).

findings.issue: DomainsNeedingPopulate (internal/ownership/populate.go:71) still enumerates the hardcoded canonical root `.mindspec/docs/domains`, which is absent on a flat tree. Result: `mindspec ownership populate` no-arg silently returns nothing on the now-flat repo AND on every born-flat greenfield project (bootstrap creates flat .mindspec/domains), masking unpopulated manifests behind a misleading 'all populated' message. This is the SAME flat-blindness the bead fixed for canonicalDomains/listSpecs/orphaned_beads, sits in a file this commit edited, and violates Req3's 'EVERY consumer that enumerates under DocsDir MUST resolve through a layout-aware accessor' — so the pivotal claim 'flat cleanup is COMPLETE' is not yet true. Trivial fix: workspace.DomainsDir(root).

Display-only (not enumeration) stale `.mindspec/docs/domains` strings remain: doctor manifestCheckName label (internal/doctor/ownership.go:85 returns docs/domains/...) and validate/docsync.go:516,580 error-message text ('no doc updates under .mindspec/docs/domains/<d>/'). These join nothing on disk — purely cosmetic message drift on flat trees. Low priority; can be folded into the populate fix or a follow-up.

Independently confirmed both claimed failures are pre-existing + layout-independent, NOT 106 regressions. internal/instruct/TestRun_IdleNoBeads = z4ps ambient-bd leak (my run: instruct rendered implement-mode with '[activeBead] ... no activeBead is set'; test uses legacy docs/specs fixtures, untouched by 106). internal/harness/TestInstructPhaseDetection/{plan,implement} = env init.defaultBranch=main makes the sandbox branch protected, so RenderIdleIfProtected short-circuits to idle before worktree/redirect detection (literal 'main is protected' guidance in output; instruct.go protected logic + run.go unchanged by 106). All other 23+ non-harness packages green. Reasoning is SOUND.

ms-panel-run/tally co-located-reviews instructions are correct against the binary: on a flat tree panelGateRoots (panel_advisory.go:236-244) returns only SpecDir(root,specID), and panel.Scan globs `<spec-dir>/reviews/*/panel.json`, so an agent following the skill writes panel.json where the gate actually scans. ms-spec-grill domain/ADR roots, instruct templates, setup/bootstrap text, migrate rubric, and the 8 byte-exact pre106 snapshots (all confirmed identical to parent-commit plugin SKILL.md; TestInstallSkills_RefreshesPre106Snapshot proves in-place refresh) are all correct. AC17 audit grep EMPTY across live skills/setup/templates.
